name: Advance America
description_short: At 1510 W El Camino Ave, Sacramento, CA 95833, Advance America can be reached at +1 916-569-1508.
description_long:
Advance America is a nationally recognized lender operating physical store locations across the United States, including their Jacksonville, FL branch at 1020-14 N. Edgewood Ave. The company has been in the emergency cash lending business, serving customers who need quick access to funds between paychecks or for immediate financial needs. They maintain a 4.9 out of 5 rating based on 125,585 Google reviews.

Advance America offers three primary loan products: Payday Loans ($100-$500 for 2-4 weeks), Installment Loans ($100-$1,000 with multiple payment options), and Title Loans ($2,000-$25,000 using vehicle equity as collateral). Loans are available both in-store and online, with same-day funding options. The Jacksonville location is open Monday-Thursday 10am-6pm, Friday 9am-6pm, and Saturday 9am-4pm. They require government-issued ID, proof of income, checking account, and Social Security Number/ITIN to apply.

Advance America's operational model centers on in-store customer service alongside online applications. The company emphasizes trained staff assistance, bilingual support ("Hablamos español"), and customer education on loan options. They also offer Western Union services at their locations. The Jacksonville store is positioned in a specific geographic location (Commonwealth Village, near I-95/I-295 intersection) with detailed directions provided for foot traffic.

As a short-term, high-cost lender, Advance America serves consumers with immediate cash needs but should be considered carefully due to the typical APR ranges associated with payday and title loans. Borrowers should understand repayment terms and costs before applying. The company's high review rating suggests consistent customer service execution, though this does not address the underlying cost structure of their loan products.
address: 1510 W El Camino Ave, Sacramento, CA 95833

company_info.headquarters: 1510 W El Camino Ave, Sacramento, CA 95833

pros: Same-day funding available for payday and installment loans up to $1,000
Title loans available up to $25,000 for vehicle owners, providing access to larger amounts
Online application option alongside in-store availability for convenience
4.9 out of 5 star rating based on 125,585 verified Google reviews
Multiple loan products to choose from based on borrower circumstances
Western Union services available at store locations
Extended weekend hours (Saturday 9am-4pm) for working customers
cons: Payday loans limited to $100-$500 with 2-4 week terms, typical of predatory lending structures with high APRs
Title loans require vehicle as collateral, risking car repossession if repayment fails
No pricing or APR information disclosed on website; actual cost of borrowing unclear to consumers
Installment loans capped at $1,000, limiting utility for larger financial emergencies
Physical store requirement for in-person applications reduces accessibility for some consumers
best_for: Workers facing short-term cash gaps between paychecks with immediate needs
Vehicle owners needing larger amounts ($2,000+) who can leverage title loans
Bilingual Spanish speakers seeking personalized loan guidance in their preferred language
Borrowers lacking access to traditional banking or credit products who need rapid funding
diagnosis: Advance America is best for workers facing immediate cash shortfalls who can access physical locations or complete online applications quickly. The primary caveat is that payday and installment loans carry typical industry APRs (often 400%+ annualized) making them expensive short-term solutions; title loans carry repossession risk. Borrowers should explore payday loan alternatives or credit union PALs before committing.
services: Installment Loans ($100-$1,000 with multiple payment options)
In-store loan applications and customer consultations
Online account login and loan management
